0801_running_command.initialContent:
# Counter

count = 0

def increment():
    global count
    count += 1
    return count

def reset():
    global count
    count = 0

0869_set_hlsearch.initialContent:

    name = input("Name: ")
    return name

    print(f"Hi {name}")

name = get_name()
greet(name)
